output.sparql:
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?duration WHERE {
  ?album rdfs:label "The Punisher" @en .
  ?album wdt:P529 ?tracklist .
  ?tracklist wdt:P1146 ?song .
  ?song rdfs:label "Kyoto" @en .
  ?song wdt:P2182 ?duration .
}
